questions.prompt: Discuss the challenges and solutions of integrating AI into accounting systems in Malaysia's changing business environment.
questions.idealAnswer: Challenges include data privacy concerns, lack of skilled personnel, and integration costs. Solutions involve investing in training, ensuring robust data security measures, and phased implementation.
